incidents.title: Synchronous external call on checkout path caused SEV-1 timeout cascade
incidents.root_cause: Blocking call to logging service added to hot path caused p99 to spike above SLA under peak load
incidents.resolution: Replaced synchronous call with async fire-and-forget pattern

incidents.title: Missing load test on checkout change led to production incident
incidents.root_cause: Change deployed without load test; latency degradation under 2x normal traffic
incidents.resolution: Rolled back, added mandatory load test gate for checkout handlers
